Interface IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX
Assembly
ESRI.Server.CartoX.dll

Provides access to the annotation feature class extension.

[Guid("76AA4719-0C0C-455D-B84C-0F2080F90E51")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IMEAnnotationFeatureClassExtensionBridge

Properties

AllowSymbolOverrides

Indicates if an annotation may override a symbol property even though it references the symbol collection.

bool AllowSymbolOverrides { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

AutoCreate

Indicates if feature-linked annotation is to be automatically created when a feature is created.

bool AutoCreate { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Build

The build number of the annotation feature class. Used for internal purposes.

string Build { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

CIMVersion

The CIM Version of the annotation feature class.

string CIMVersion { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureClass

The annotation feature class this class extension applies to.

IFeatureClass FeatureClass { get; }

Property Value

IFeatureClass

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeneralPlacementPropertiesJSON

The general placement properties of the label engine.

string GeneralPlacementPropertiesJSON { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

LabelClassCollectionJSON

The annotation class properties of the annotation feature class expressed as a collection of label classes.

string LabelClassCollectionJSON { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

LinkedFeatureClass

The feature class to which the annotation class is feature linked.

IFeatureClass LinkedFeatureClass { get; }

Property Value

IFeatureClass

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxLabelClassID

The maximum symbol ID value of the symbol collection.

int MaxLabelClassID { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxSymbolID

The maximum symbol ID value of the symbol collection.

int MaxSymbolID { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReferenceScale

The reference scale.

double ReferenceScale { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReferenceScaleUnit

The reference scale units of the annotation feature class. Only applicable if the feature class has an unknown coordinate system.

IUnit ReferenceScaleUnit { get; set; }

Property Value

IUnit

Examples

Sample Snippet

RequireSymbolID

Indicates if an annotation must reference a symbol in the symbol collection.

bool RequireSymbolID { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

SymbolCollectionJSON

The symbol collection of the annotation feature class as a JSON string.

string SymbolCollectionJSON { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

UpdateOnShapeChange

Indicates if an annotation is to be automatically recreated when a feature's shape is changed.

bool UpdateOnShapeChange { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Version

The version of the annotation feature class. Used for internal purposes.

short Version { get; set; }

Property Value

short

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

ResetProperties()

Resets the annotation feature class extension to the properties persisted in the dataset.

void ResetProperties()

Examples

Sample Snippet

UpdateProperties()

Updates the annotation feature class extension properties in the database with this object's properties in their current state.

void UpdateProperties()
